scripts.rulesync:skills: bun run rulesync install --mode rulesync && bun scripts/patch-rulesync-skill-frontmatter.ts && bun run rulesync generate --targets codexcli,opencode --features skills
scripts.rulesync:skills:update: bun run rulesync install --mode rulesync --update && bun scripts/patch-rulesync-skill-frontmatter.ts && bun run rulesync generate --targets codexcli,opencode --features skills
scripts.rulesync:skills:claude: root="$PWD" && cd rulesync-claude && ../node_modules/.bin/rulesync install --mode rulesync && bun ../scripts/patch-rulesync-skill-frontmatter.ts && ../node_modules/.bin/rulesync generate --targets claudecode --features skills --output-roots "$root"
scripts.rulesync:skills:claude:update: root="$PWD" && cd rulesync-claude && ../node_modules/.bin/rulesync install --mode rulesync --update && bun ../scripts/patch-rulesync-skill-frontmatter.ts && ../node_modules/.bin/rulesync generate --targets claudecode --features skills --output-roots "$root"
